name: Is it safe to clean up water damage myself, or should I call a professional?

mainEntity.name: Is it safe to clean up water damage myself, or should I call a professional?

acceptedAnswer.text: If the water is contaminated (sewage, floodwater), evacuate immediately and call a professional—DIY is unsafe. Clean water from pipes may be manageable with wet-vacs and towels, but hidden moisture requires professional tools. Never handle contaminated water alone due to bacteria and pathogens. Call a professional if there is standing water, structural damage, or trapped moisture. Safety is the priority over saving money.
acceptedAnswer.description: Call a professional immediately for contaminated water (sewage/flood); DIY is unsafe. For clean water, use wet-vacs but hire pros for hidden moisture or structural damage.
